items.body_excerpt: Tari Eason was offered a 100 million dollar contract last year but turned it down, now he seems disappointed that he signed for only 80 million dollars instead. https://imgur.com/a/dy7vXQP Edit: It's 5 years 81.5 million I messed up the title.

items.title: The Rockets like to do flat and descending structured contracts. I'll project Tari Eason with a $19 million starting salary until we get confirmation, which is the highest they could give him with these terms.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Rockets like to do flat and descending structured contracts. I'll project Tari Eason with a $19 million starting salary until we get confirmation, which is the highest they could give him with these terms.

They'd have enough room to add two minimums under the second apron.

items.title: If Tari Eason's new five-year deal has the standard 8% raise structure, he'll start around $14M for next season.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
If Tari Eason's new five-year deal has the standard 8% raise structure, he'll start around $14M for next season.

I've got the Rockets at $9.6M over the tax, $1.1M over the first apron and $11.6M under their second-apron hard cap.

items.title: Restricted free agent Tari Eason has agreed to a five-year, $81.5 million deal to return to the Houston Rockets, sources tell ESPN. The deal is fully guaranteed for Eason.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Restricted free agent Tari Eason has agreed to a five-year, $81.5 million deal to return to the Houston Rockets, sources tell ESPN. The deal is fully guaranteed for Eason.

items.title: Expect the Marcus Smart contract with the Rockets to come in just at or below the Taxpayer MLE amount of $6.06M. That way Houston avoids a first-apron hard cap and potential issues with matching offer sheets for Tari Eason.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Expect the Marcus Smart contract with the Rockets to come in just at or below the Taxpayer MLE amount of $6.06M. That way Houston avoids a first-apron hard cap and potential issues with matching offer sheets for Tari Eason.

Rockets can still shed salary in other trades too.
